mission: Update BIQc Homepage Hero Rotator with 'Liquid Steel' precision, impactful copy, and manual controls.
target_audience: SMB owners/founders in Australia, non-technical, time-poor.

components.name: LiquidSteelHeroRotator
components.description: The core rotating hero component. Needs updated copy, orange highlights, manual navigation, and 12s interval.

content_variants.h1: BIQc — A Single **Stability Engine** Across All Departments & Tools
content_variants.h2: Unify fragmented business tools, data and departments into **structured decision ready intelligence**

content_variants.h1: **Integrates** your Financials, Operational, Sales & Marketing Systems Into **One Intelligence Layer**
content_variants.h2: BIQc connects your systems, **detects emerging risk**, and measures the real impact of **leadership decisions**.
**Detect instability**, constantly learning from every past and present to **strengthen** your business decisions

requirements.highlight_parsing: Parse '**' markers in h1 and h2 strings to apply the highlight color.
requirements.icons: Use ChevronLeft and ChevronRight from 'lucide-react' for navigation arrows.

implementation_notes: Remove the 'bullets' array from the variants (as per 'NO bullet points' rule).
Ensure navigation arrows reset the auto-rotation timer when clicked.
Arrows should be absolutely positioned on the left and right edges of the viewport, vertically centered.
Ensure arrows have z-index > 2 to be clickable over the text layers.
Maintain the existing 'phase' based transition logic (current-static, current-exiting, etc.).
Ensure the component handles rich text parsing safely (e.g., helper function to split string by '**').

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless specified.
Strictly follow the 'Liquid Steel' color palette.
Do not add any 'AI' emojis to the UI.
